prompt: Redesign the provided file explorer screenshot to look like it belongs on a retro 1980s computer terminal with a monochrome green-on-black display.
prompt_refined: Generate an image that re-renders the content of image 1 – including the Windows File Explorer window, desktop icons, and background – to appear as if displayed on a retro 1980s computer terminal. The entire display should be monochrome green-on-black, featuring pixelated character-based text and graphics, and visible CRT scanlines.
objects: Desktop icons (Andiun Xue folder, This PC, Network, Recycle Bin)
File Explorer content area (displaying folders and drives)
